mapper.sql: select JF.SPUUID, JF.DJXH, JF.SHXYDM, JF.NSRMC, JF.NSRJC, JF.dept_id, JF.GHJGXZJB, JF.CLGHBJ, JF.HYGHBZ, JF.SDGHJG_DM, JF.SDGHJGXZJB, JF.ZGSWJ_DM, JF.ZGSWSKFJ_DM, JF.SSGLY_DM, JF.GHLB_DM, JF.XTLB_DM, JF.ZZJGLX_DM, JF.HY_DM, JF.DJZCLX_DM, JF.DWLSGX_DM, JF.SBLB_DM, JF.NSSBRQ, JF.PZXH, JF.PZMXXH, JF.SKSSQQ, JF.SKSSQZ, JF.ZSSWJG_DM, JF.SKSSSWJG_DM, JF.SKGK_DM, JF.DZSPHM, JF.PZZL_DM, JF.PZZG_DM, JF.PZHM, JF.KPY_DM, JF.KPY_XM, JF.ZSPM_DM, JF.ZSZM_DM, JF.YSKM_DM, JF.GZZE, JF.SL, JF.YNSE, JF.JMSE, JF.YJSE, JF.YBTSE, JF.JKFS_DM, JF.JFHB, JF.JFZH, JF.JFHM, JF.JFHH, JF.JFYH, JF.RKRQ, JF.JSBJ, JF.JSRQ, JF.JSCZY, JF.JCGHZH, JF.JCGHHM, JF.JCGHHH, JF.JCGHBL, JF.JCGHJE, JF.CBJZH, JF.CBJHM, JF.CBJHH, JF.CBJBL, JF.CBJJE, JF.HYGHZH, JF.HYGHHM, JF.HYGHHH, JF.HYGHBL, JF.HYGHJE, JF.XJGHZH, JF.XJGHHM, JF.XJGHHH, JF.XJGHBL, JF.XJGHJE, JF.SJGHZH, JF.SJGHHM, JF.SJGHHH, JF.SJGHBL, JF.SJGHJE, JF.SZGHZH, JF.SZGHHM, JF.SZGHHH, JF.SZGHBL, JF.SZGHJE, JF.QGGHZH, JF.QGGHHM, JF.QGGHHH, JF.QGGHBL, JF.QGGHJE, JF.JCJZH, JF.JCJHM, JF.JCJHH, JF.JCJBL, JF.JCJJE, JF.JCWSH, JF.SDSZH, JF.SDSHM, JF.SDSHH, JF.SDSBL, JF.SDSJE, JF.SWJGZH, JF.SWJGHM, JF.SWJGHH, JF.SWJGBL, JF.SWJGJE, JF.CBJTHBJ, JF.CBJTHRQ, JF.CBJTHCZY, JF.JYM, JF.HKPCH, JF.BZ, JF.BLUUID, JF.SDGHZH, JF.SDGHHM, JF.SDGHHH, JF.SDGHBL, JF.SDGHJE, JF.CREATE_BY, JF.CREATE_TIME, JF.UPDATE_BY, JF.UPDATE_TIME,hj.hjfl9_dm as xwlx, hj.hjfl4_dm AS xelx24,hj.hjfl10_dm AS xelx25, hj.hjfl6_dm AS xelx23 from gh_jf jf left join gh_hj hj on jf.djxh=hj.djxh

select JF.SPUUID, JF.DJXH, JF.SHXYDM, JF.NSRMC, JF.NSRJC, JF.dept_id, JF.GHJGXZJB, JF.CLGHBJ, JF.HYGHBZ, JF.SDGHJG_DM, JF.SDGHJGXZJB, JF.ZGSWJ_DM, JF.ZGSWSKFJ_DM, JF.SSGLY_DM, JF.GHLB_DM, JF.XTLB_DM, JF.ZZJGLX_DM, JF.HY_DM, JF.DJZCLX_DM, JF.DWLSGX_DM, JF.SBLB_DM, JF.NSSBRQ, JF.PZXH, JF.PZMXXH, JF.SKSSQQ, JF.SKSSQZ, JF.ZSSWJG_DM, JF.SKSSSWJG_DM, JF.SKGK_DM, JF.DZSPHM, JF.PZZL_DM, JF.PZZG_DM, JF.PZHM, JF.KPY_DM, JF.KPY_XM, JF.ZSPM_DM, JF.ZSZM_DM, JF.YSKM_DM, JF.GZZE, JF.SL, JF.YNSE, JF.JMSE, JF.YJSE, JF.YBTSE, JF.JKFS_DM, JF.JFHB, JF.JFZH, JF.JFHM, JF.JFHH, JF.JFYH, JF.RKRQ, JF.JSBJ, JF.JSRQ, JF.JSCZY, JF.JCGHZH, JF.JCGHHM, JF.JCGHHH, JF.JCGHBL, JF.JCGHJE, JF.CBJZH, JF.CBJHM, JF.CBJHH, JF.CBJBL, JF.CBJJE, JF.HYGHZH, JF.HYGHHM, JF.HYGHHH, JF.HYGHBL, JF.HYGHJE, JF.XJGHZH, JF.XJGHHM, JF.XJGHHH, JF.XJGHBL, JF.XJGHJE, JF.SJGHZH, JF.SJGHHM, JF.SJGHHH, JF.SJGHBL, JF.SJGHJE, JF.SZGHZH, JF.SZGHHM, JF.SZGHHH, JF.SZGHBL, JF.SZGHJE, JF.QGGHZH, JF.QGGHHM, JF.QGGHHH, JF.QGGHBL, JF.QGGHJE, JF.JCJZH, JF.JCJHM, JF.JCJHH, JF.JCJBL, JF.JCJJE, JF.JCWSH, JF.SDSZH, JF.SDSHM, JF.SDSHH, JF.SDSBL, JF.SDSJE, JF.SWJGZH, JF.SWJGHM, JF.SWJGHH, JF.SWJGBL, JF.SWJGJE, JF.CBJTHBJ, JF.CBJTHRQ, JF.CBJTHCZY, JF.JYM, JF.HKPCH, JF.BZ, JF.BLUUID, JF.SDGHZH, JF.SDGHHM, JF.SDGHHH, JF.SDGHBL, JF.SDGHJE, JF.CREATE_BY, JF.CREATE_TIME, JF.UPDATE_BY, JF.UPDATE_TIME,hj.hjfl9_dm as xwlx,hj.hjfl4_dm AS xelx24,hj.hjfl10_dm AS xelx25,hj.hjfl6_dm AS xelx23 from gh_jf jf left join gh_hj hj on jf.djxh=hj.djxh
mapper.select:
SELECT t.DWDM AS sjdm, t.DEPT_ID AS xjdm, T.DEPT_ID AS deptId, date_format(T.RKRQ, '%Y-%m') AS dsyf, COUNT(T.DJXH) AS bs, COUNT(DISTINCT T.DJXH) AS hs, SUM(T.YBTSE) AS ybtse, SUM(T.JCGHJE) AS jcghje, SUM(T.HYGHJE) AS hyghje, SUM(T.SDGHJE) AS sdghje, SUM(T.CBJJE) AS cbjje, SUM(T.XJGHJE) AS xjghje, SUM(T.SJGHJE) AS sjghje, SUM(T.SZGHJE) AS szghje, SUM(T.QGGHJE) AS qgghje, SUM(T.SWJGJE) AS swjgje, SUM(T.SDSJE) AS sdsje FROM szjfcx T
GROUP BY t.DWDM, t.DEPT_ID, date_format(T.RKRQ, '%Y-%m')

SELECT t.DWDM AS sjdm, t.DEPT_ID AS xjdm, T.DEPT_ID AS deptId, date_format(T.RKRQ, '%Y') AS nd, COUNT(T.DJXH) AS bs, COUNT(DISTINCT T.DJXH) AS hs, SUM(T.YBTSE) AS ybtse, SUM(T.JCGHJE) AS jcghje, SUM(T.HYGHJE) AS hyghje, SUM(T.SDGHJE) AS sdghje, SUM(T.CBJJE) AS cbjje, SUM(T.XJGHJE) AS xjghje, SUM(T.SJGHJE) AS sjghje, SUM(T.SZGHJE) AS szghje, SUM(T.QGGHJE) AS qgghje, SUM(T.SWJGJE) AS swjgje, SUM(T.SDSJE) AS sdsje FROM szjfcx T
GROUP BY t.DWDM, t.DEPT_ID, date_format(T.RKRQ, '%Y')

SELECT t.DWDM AS sjdm, t.DEPT_ID AS xjdm, T.DEPT_ID AS deptId, CONCAT(date_format(T.RKRQ, '%Y'), '-Q', QUARTER(T.RKRQ)) AS sjzq, COUNT(T.DJXH) AS bs, COUNT(DISTINCT T.DJXH) AS hs, SUM(T.YBTSE) AS ybtse, SUM(T.JCGHJE) AS jcghje, SUM(T.HYGHJE) AS hyghje, SUM(T.SDGHJE) AS sdghje, SUM(T.CBJJE) AS cbjje, SUM(T.XJGHJE) AS xjghje, SUM(T.SJGHJE) AS sjghje, SUM(T.SZGHJE) AS szghje, SUM(T.QGGHJE) AS qgghje, SUM(T.SWJGJE) AS swjgje, SUM(T.SDSJE) AS sdsje FROM szjfcx T
GROUP BY t.DWDM, t.DEPT_ID, date_format(T.RKRQ, '%Y'), QUARTER(T.RKRQ)

SELECT t.DWDM AS sjdm, t.DEPT_ID AS xjdm, T.DEPT_ID AS deptId, date_format(T.RKRQ, '%Y') AS nd, COUNT(T.DJXH) AS bs, COUNT(DISTINCT T.DJXH) AS hs, SUM(T.YBTSE) AS ybtse, SUM(T.JCGHJE) AS jcghje, SUM(T.HYGHJE) AS hyghje, SUM(T.SDGHJE) AS sdghje, SUM(T.CBJJE) AS cbjje, SUM(T.XJGHJE) AS xjghje, SUM(T.SJGHJE) AS sjghje, SUM(T.SZGHJE) AS szghje, SUM(T.QGGHJE) AS qgghje, SUM(T.SWJGJE) AS swjgje, SUM(T.SDSJE) AS sdsje FROM szjfcx T
GROUP BY t.DWDM, t.DEPT_ID, date_format(T.RKRQ, '%Y')

SELECT t.DWDM AS sjdm, t.DEPT_ID AS xjdm, T.DEPT_ID AS deptId, T.ZGSWJ_DM AS swjgDm, COUNT(T.DJXH) AS bs, COUNT(DISTINCT T.DJXH) AS hs, SUM(T.YBTSE) AS ybtse, SUM(T.JCGHJE) AS jcghje, SUM(T.HYGHJE) AS hyghje, SUM(T.SDGHJE) AS sdghje, SUM(T.CBJJE) AS cbjje, SUM(T.XJGHJE) AS xjghje, SUM(T.SJGHJE) AS sjghje, SUM(T.SZGHJE) AS szghje, SUM(T.QGGHJE) AS qgghje, SUM(T.SWJGJE) AS swjgje, SUM(T.SDSJE) AS sdsje FROM szjfcx T
GROUP BY t.DWDM, t.DEPT_ID, T.ZGSWJ_DM
